predicates.name: is_surviving_spouse_of
predicates.description: The first person is the surviving spouse of the second person (the deceased). This background status may be directly asserted in a case.

predicates.name: is_heir_of
predicates.description: The first person is an heir of the second person (the deceased).

predicates.name: served_as_family_principal_residence
predicates.description: The property served as the family's principal residence at the time the estate of the deceased opened.

predicates.name: is_leased_property
predicates.description: The property is held under a lease (i.e. the deceased held a lease on the property).

predicates.name: acquires_right_to_lease
predicates.description: The surviving spouse acquires exclusively the right to the lease of the property, to the exclusion of all other heirs.

predicates.name: excluded_from_right_to_lease
predicates.description: The heir is excluded from the right to the lease of the property because the surviving spouse acquires it exclusively.
